brand_voice.summary: Crumbl Cookies PR communicates with a playful and celebratory tone, engaging customers through informative content about new dessert offerings. The bilingual approach enhances accessibility and connection with a diverse audience.

strategic_gaps: Increase engagement with seasonal content to capitalize on holidays and special occasions.
Incorporate more user-generated content to enhance community involvement and brand loyalty.
ogz_recommendation: OGZ would recommend implementing a more structured posting schedule to maintain consistent engagement. Additionally, leveraging the best-performing video format for promotional campaigns could drive higher visibility and interaction rates.
